DKIM Record for gamifying.dev

Add this as a TXT record in GoDaddy:

Name: mail._domainkey
Value: v=DKIM1; h=sha256; k=rsa; 
TTL: 3600

Complete DNS Records Needed:
=============================

| Type | Name | Value |
|------|------|-------|
| A | mail | 85.194.34.199 |
| A | webmail | 85.194.34.199 |
| MX | @ | mail.gamifying.dev (priority 10) |
| TXT | @ | v=spf1 mx a ip4:85.194.34.199 ~all |
| TXT | _dmarc | v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:postmaster@gamifying.dev |
| TXT | mail._domainkey | (see DKIM value above) |
| PTR | (contact VPS provider) | mail.gamifying.dev |
